prompt: Create a realistic courtside smartphone-style photo of a young adult Lakers fan with dark hair tied in a messy top bun sitting very close to the court at a packed Los Angeles Lakers basketball game. The person is centered in the foreground from mid-torso up, wearing an oversized purple hoodie with a large yellow-and-white “LAKERS” logo across the chest, holding a black smartphone in their left hand as if checking messages or taking a selfie. Their face is intentionally covered by a plain opaque medium-brown rectangular privacy block, while one ear and hairline remain visible. The arena behind them is full of fans, bright stadium lights, multiple seating tiers, glowing blue ribbon boards, and visible Lakers branding including “LAKERS.COM” on the upper scoreboard band. Include the basketball hoop, backboard, shot clock, and a red “AAA.com” sponsor panel in the mid-background, with players and staff gathered on the court to the right. The composition should feel like an authentic candid photo taken from a premium lower-bowl seat, with realistic depth, natural indoor arena lighting, slight phone-camera perspective distortion, detailed crowd texture, black courtside chairs in the foreground, and a lively game-night atmosphere. Use Los Angeles Lakers colors prominently, especially purple and gold. No illustrated style, no fantasy elements, no watermark.
